name: designer
description: A portable UI/UX designer for Claude Code. Foundational craft skills plus a curated set of best-in-class design skills, tuned to honor each project's own vibe instead of homogenizing it.

plugins.name: designer
plugins.description: Foundational designer skills: read a project's existing design system and vibe and honor it, build the project its own system when it has none, audit an existing one for consistency, apply solid UX principles, and work from a brand kit. designer imposes no house style — every project gets its own, integrated into its repo.

plugins.name: impeccable
plugins.description: Paul Bakaus' design-fluency skill. One skill with ~23 commands (/impeccable polish, audit, critique, craft, ...) plus curated anti-pattern detection. Ships an agent and a PostToolUse hook that lints UI edits (requires Node).

plugins.name: taste-skill
plugins.description: Leon's anti-slop taste library: brutalist, minimalist, soft, redesign, brandkit, image-to-code and more. Reads the brief and ships interfaces that don't look templated.

plugins.name: emil-design-skills
plugins.description: Emil Kowalski's design-engineering skills (Vercel/Linear pedigree): emil-design-eng, review-animations, and animation-vocabulary. Sharp taste on motion, easing, and interface detail.
